display.purpose: Page h1s: artist name, genre, 'Local Upcoming Music', app name. One per page. Never on UI labels or buttons.

headline.purpose: Section h2s: 'Upcoming Events', 'Show Info', 'Historical Setlists', 'Upcoming Tour Dates'.

title.purpose: Card h3 event names. First tier of the Space Grotesk body system.

body.purpose: Card dates, descriptions. Extra leading compensates for perceived weight loss on dark backgrounds.

label.purpose: Venue, city, country metadata. Smallest size in the system (0.75rem).

shadows.name: form-container
shadows.purpose: Global search form only. Separates from header gradient without hard edges.

motion.name: page-enter
motion.purpose: Page/content entrance. Reduced-motion fallback: instant show, no translate.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Button and input hover/focus state changes.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Search form switches from column to row. Cards switch to 2-column grid.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Show detail page switches to 2-column side-by-side layout.

components.name: Primary CTA Button
components.description: Full-width on cards. Links to show detail + setlist page. Amber background, near-black text (~9.4:1 contrast).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; padding: 10px 12px; background: #f59e0b; color: #09090b; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 8px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #fbbf24; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f59e0b; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Disabled / Unavailable Button
components.description: Shows when no show link is available. Non-interactive.
components.css: .ds-btn-disabled { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; padding: 10px 12px; background: #1e293b; color: #64748b; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #334155; cursor: default; }

components.name: Event Card
components.description: Discovery feed card. Three-tier hierarchy: semibold title, bright date, muted venue.
components.html:
Artist Name at Venue

2026-07-15 • 8:00 PM

Crystal Ballroom • Portland, US

View Show + Setlist History
components.css: .ds-event-card { background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.6); border: 1px solid #1e293b; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; } .ds-event-card__title { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #f1f5f9; margin: 0 0 4px; } .ds-event-card__date { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #e2e8f0; margin: 0 0 2px; } .ds-event-card__venue { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 400; color: #64748b; margin: 0; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Artist or genre text input. Amber focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { flex: 1; background: #020617; border: 1px solid #475569; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #f1f5f9; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #64748b; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #fbbf24; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.2); }

components.name: Search Form
components.description: Global search bar in the header. Amber submit button, amber focus rings.
components.html: <form class="ds-search-form"><select class="ds-select"><option>Artist</option><option>Genre</option></select><input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="Search artist"><button class="ds-search-submit" type="submit">Search</button></form>
components.css: .ds-search-form { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.7); border: 1px solid rgba(51, 65, 85, 0.8); border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.6); } @media (min-width: 768px) { .ds-search-form { flex-direction: row; align-items: center; } } .ds-select { background: #020617; border: 1px solid #475569; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #f1f5f9; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-select:focus { border-color: #fbbf24; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.2); } .ds-search-submit { background: #f59e0b; color: #09090b; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-search-submit:hover { background: #fbbf24; } .ds-search-submit:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Setlist Accordion Item
components.description: The signature component. Expands to show the song list for a historical show. Amber focus ring.
components.html:
• Song One
  • Song Two
  • Song Three
components.css: .ds-setlist-item { overflow: hidden; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #1e293b; background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.6); } .ds-setlist-toggle { display: flex; width: 100%; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; text-align: left; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; } .ds-setlist-toggle:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); } .ds-setlist-toggle:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f59e0b; outline-offset: -2px; } .ds-setlist-date { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #f1f5f9; margin: 0 0 2px; } .ds-setlist-venue { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #94a3b8; margin: 0; } .ds-setlist-hint { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #94a3b8; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-setlist-body { border-top: 1px solid #1e293b; padding: 12px 16px; } .ds-setlist-songs { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-setlist-songs li { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #cbd5e1; }

narrative.overview:
The design system draws from the information environment of a real show: the whiteboard setlist backstage, the typed door list, the stack of tickets at the box office. Nothing decorative. Everything present because it has a job.

The palette is dark slate with a single amber accent — concert spotlight energy, not corporate blue. Barlow Condensed headings reference show posters and venue signage; Space Grotesk body text is clean enough to disappear into the task.

Density is deliberate. Music fans scan for specifics: dates, venues, names. The system uses tight spacing and small type where it works, opening up only where the hierarchy demands breathing room.
keyCharacteristics: Information-first: no decoration that doesn't carry meaning
Tactile and immediate: elements respond crisply; interactions feel direct
Fan-built, not corporate: language and layout feel like they were made by someone who goes to shows
Earned darkness: the dark theme references the venue environment, not a SaaS aesthetic
WCAG AA contrast at minimum for all text

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Spotlight amber (#f59e0b) is the only accent in normal flow. CTA buttons, links, focus rings. No blue. No gradient on the CTA — flat amber, dark text, full stop.

rules.name: The Anti-Slate Rule
rules.body: Cold slate is acceptable as infrastructure. The amber accent is what gives it character. Don't reintroduce blue accents. Don't add a second accent color without strategic reason.

rules.name: The Two-Family Rule
rules.body: Barlow Condensed for headings (h1, h2) only. Space Grotesk for everything else. Never put Barlow Condensed on buttons, inputs, card body, or UI labels.

rules.name: The No-Uppercase Rule
rules.body: Avoid uppercase tracking as a section kicker. The venue board uses condensed type weight to create hierarchy, not all-caps decoration.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Card surfaces are flat. Shadows appear only on the global search form. Do not add shadow to content cards — that escalates decoration over signal.

dos: Do keep the background at Stage Blackout (#020617) or darker. The venue is never beige.
Do use house-lights (#f1f5f9) for all headings and primary content text. Verify 4.5:1 contrast before any palette changes.
Do use rounded-lg (8px) consistently on all cards and interactive elements. Consistency is the system.
Do use focus:border-amber-400 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-amber-500/20 on every focusable input element. Keyboard navigation is not optional.
Do keep card surfaces flat (bg-slate-900/60, no shadow). Elevation is reserved for the search form only.
Do use @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) for every animation.
Do use font-display (Barlow Condensed) only on h1 and h2 elements. Space Grotesk (font-sans) carries the rest.
Do favor type-driven hierarchy over icons and decorative elements. The information IS the design.
donts: Don't reintroduce sky-blue or corporate blue as an accent. The accent is amber (#f59e0b). One voice.
Don't use background-clip: text with gradient backgrounds on any text element. Gradient text is decorative and never meaningful.
Don't add border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or callouts.
Don't use uppercase tracking as a section kicker. The eyebrow pattern is a named ban.
Don't build identical card grids with only icon + heading + body.
Don't replicate the Ticketmaster / StubHub pattern of competing CTAs. One primary action per card, always.
Don't import Spotify's algorithmic discovery language — 'You might also like', 'Recommended for you'.
Don't add shadows to content cards. The Flat-by-Default Rule is not a suggestion.
Don't put Barlow Condensed on buttons, inputs, card body text, or any UI label. The Two-Family Rule is strict.
Don't let placeholder text fall below 4.5:1 contrast. stage-fog (#64748b) on stage-blackout (#020617) is marginal — verify with any palette change.
